Manages shared persistent storage and defines data structures for Bluetooth pairing and device identity.


## Files
- **[shared_prf_storage.c](shared_prf_storage.c.md)**: Manages shared persistent storage for Bluetooth pairing data, device names, and factory reset operations.
- **[shared_prf_storage_private.h](shared_prf_storage_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures for storing Bluetooth pairing information and device identity in Pebble firmware.
